metadata.name: 06_二元条件与Mock工具
metadata.description: 演示基础的二元条件分支(Condition)节点和Mock工具节点的作用

graph_json: {"elements": [{"id": "node_start", "type": "start", "position": {"x": 100, "y": 200}, "data": {"config": {"inputVariables": ["score"]}}, "label": "开始"}, {"id": "node_condition", "type": "condition", "position": {"x": 350, "y": 200}, "data": {"config": {"expression": "score >= 60", "trueRoute": "node_tool_pass", "falseRoute": "node_tool_fail"}}, "label": "分数判断"}, {"id": "node_tool_pass", "type": "tool", "position": {"x": 650, "y": 100}, "data": {"config": {"outputVariable": "record_result", "mockData": "已记录为及格"}}, "label": "记录及格"}, {"id": "node_tool_fail", "type": "tool", "position": {"x": 650, "y": 300}, "data": {"config": {"outputVariable": "record_result", "mockData": "已记录为不及格，需要补考"}}, "label": "记录不及格"}, {"id": "node_end", "type": "end", "position": {"x": 950, "y": 200}, "data": {"config": {"outputFormat": "json", "outputFields": [{"name": "result", "type": "string", "value": "{record_result}", "children": []}]}}, "label": "结束"}, {"id": "edge_node_start_node_condition", "type": "default", "source": "node_start", "target": "node_condition", "data": {"condition": ""}, "label": "", "animated": true, "style": {"stroke": "#409eff", "strokeWidth": 2}}, {"id": "edge_node_condition_node_tool_pass_true", "type": "default", "source": "node_condition", "target": "node_tool_pass", "data": {"condition": ""}, "label": "", "animated": true, "style": {"stroke": "#409eff", "strokeWidth": 2}, "sourceHandle": "true"}, {"id": "edge_node_condition_node_tool_fail_false", "type": "default", "source": "node_condition", "target": "node_tool_fail", "data": {"condition": ""}, "label": "", "animated": true, "style": {"stroke": "#409eff", "strokeWidth": 2}, "sourceHandle": "false"}, {"id": "edge_node_tool_pass_node_end", "type": "default", "source": "node_tool_pass", "target": "node_end", "data": {"condition": ""}, "label": "", "animated": true, "style": {"stroke": "#409eff", "strokeWidth": 2}}, {"id": "edge_node_tool_fail_node_end", "type": "default", "source": "node_tool_fail", "target": "node_end", "data": {"condition": ""}, "label": "", "animated": true, "style": {"stroke": "#409eff", "strokeWidth": 2}}], "nodes": [{"id": "node_start", "type": "start", "name": "开始", "config": {"inputVariables": ["score"]}}, {"id": "node_condition", "type": "condition", "name": "分数判断", "config": {"expression": "score >= 60", "trueRoute": "node_tool_pass", "falseRoute": "node_tool_fail"}}, {"id": "node_tool_pass", "type": "tool", "name": "记录及格", "config": {"outputVariable": "record_result", "mockData": "已记录为及格"}}, {"id": "node_tool_fail", "type": "tool", "name": "记录不及格", "config": {"outputVariable": "record_result", "mockData": "已记录为不及格，需要补考"}}, {"id": "node_end", "type": "end", "name": "结束", "config": {"outputFormat": "json", "outputFields": [{"name": "result", "type": "string", "value": "{record_result}", "children": []}]}}], "edges": [{"source": "node_start", "target": "node_condition", "type": "default", "condition": ""}, {"source": "node_condition", "target": "node_tool_pass", "type": "default", "condition": "", "sourceHandle": "true"}, {"source": "node_condition", "target": "node_tool_fail", "type": "default", "condition": "", "sourceHandle": "false"}, {"source": "node_tool_pass", "target": "node_end", "type": "default", "condition": ""}, {"source": "node_tool_fail", "target": "node_end", "type": "default", "condition": ""}]}
